data.title: Contacts
data.description:
Back up and sync your contacts across all your devices
• Keep your contacts safely backed up to your Google Account
• Access your contacts from anywhere you’re signed in, including your next phone
• Recover contacts deleted in the last 30 days from Trash

Keep your contacts organized and up to date
• View your contacts by account (such as work or personal)
• Easily add contacts and edit information like phone numbers, emails, and photos
• Get help merging duplicate contacts, adding useful details, and more

Connect with the people who matter most
• View highlights, like upcoming birthdays and anniversaries
• Add notifications so you never miss a special day
• Easily access contacts you recently added or viewed

 Also available for Wear OS, including a favorite contacts tile, individual contact tile, and contact complication
